sourceAmbiguity: Refresh and post-auth return might restore only the route but not the selected anchor.
decisionTaken: PatientRequestReturnBundle and PatientNavReturnContract carry selectedStepKey, selectedAnchorKey, and focusTestId.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Same-shell law requires preserving step, anchor, and last-safe summary where lawful.
operationalRisk: Real auth redirects must preserve the return bundle.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Wire auth callback state to the same return bundle fields.
